{"parts":[{"tool_name":"create_or_rewrite_file","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/text-to-diagram/references/mermaid-syntax.md\", \"content\": \"---\\ncreated: 2026-02-06\\nlast_edited: 2026-02-06\\nversion: 1.0\\nprovenance: con_A6c99gs3C9tU3S2O\\n---\\n\\n# Mermaid Syntax Reference\\n\\nFor generating flowcharts that render natively in Excalidraw with hand-drawn aesthetic.\\n\\n## Why Only Flowcharts?\\n\\nExcalidraw's Mermaid integration only renders **flowcharts** as native hand-drawn elements. All other Mermaid diagram types (sequence, class, ER, gantt, etc.) are rendered as rasterized images — defeating the aesthetic purpose.\\n\\n**For non-flowchart diagrams, use raw Excalidraw JSON instead.**\\n\\n## Flowchart Basics\\n\\n### Direction\\n```\\nflowchart TB %% Top to Bottom (default)\\nflowchart TD %% Top Down (same as TB)\\nflowchart BT %% Bottom to Top\\nflowchart LR %% Left to Right\\nflowchart RL %% Right to Left\\n```\\n\\n### Node Shapes (Excalidraw-supported)\\n\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Rectangle] %% Standard box\\n B(Rounded Rectangle) %% Rounded corners\\n C{Diamond} %% Decision\\n D((Circle)) %% Circle/ellipse\\n```\\n\\n**Note:** Other Mermaid shapes (hexagon, parallelogram, etc.) fall back to rectangles in Excalidraw.\\n\\n### Connections\\n\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A --> B %% Arrow\\n A --- B %% Line (no arrow)\\n A -.- B %% Dotted line\\n A -.-> B %% Dotted arrow\\n A ==> B %% Thick arrow\\n A --text--> B %% Arrow with label\\n A -->|text| B %% Alternative label syntax\\n```\\n\\n### Labels on Nodes\\n\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[\\\"Text with special chars: (parentheses)\\\"]\\n B[\\\"Multi-line\\n text\\\"]\\n```\\n\\n## Common Patterns\\n\\n### Linear Process\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Start] --> B[Step 1]\\n B --> C[Step 2]\\n C --> D[Step 3]\\n D --> E[End]\\n```\\n\\n### Decision Tree\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Start] --> B{Decision?}\\n B -->|Yes| C[Path A]\\n B -->|No| D[Path B]\\n C --> E[End]\\n D --> E\\n```\\n\\n### Parallel Branches\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Start] --> B[Fork]\\n B --> C[Branch 1]\\n B --> D[Branch 2]\\n C --> E[Join]\\n D --> E\\n E --> F[End]\\n```\\n\\n### Loop / Cycle\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Start] --> B[Process]\\n B --> C{Done?}\\n C -->|No| B\\n C -->|Yes| D[End]\\n```\\n\\n### Subgraphs (Grouped Sections)\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TB\\n subgraph Phase1[Phase 1]\\n A[Step 1] --> B[Step 2]\\n end\\n subgraph Phase2[Phase 2]\\n C[Step 3] --> D[Step 4]\\n end\\n B --> C\\n```\\n\\n## Style Tips for Dark Theme\\n\\nExcalidraw applies its own styling, but you can influence structure:\\n\\n1. **Keep labels short** — Long text wraps awkwardly\\n2. **Use decision diamonds sparingly** — They take up space\\n3. **Prefer TD for vertical processes** — Reads naturally\\n4. **Use LR for timelines** — Horizontal flow\\n5. **Group related steps** — Use subgraphs for visual chunking\\n\\n## Syntax Gotchas\\n\\n### Reserved Words\\nWrap in quotes:\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[\\\"end\\\"] %% \\\"end\\\" is reserved\\n B[\\\"subgraph\\\"] %% \\\"subgraph\\\" is reserved\\n```\\n\\n### Special Characters\\nUse quotes for parentheses, brackets, etc.:\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[\\\"Process (optional)\\\"]\\n B[\\\"Config [v2.0]\\\"]\\n```\\n\\n### Multi-line Labels\\nUse `
` or actual line breaks in quotes:\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[\\\"Line 1
Line 2\\\"]\\n B[\\\"Line 1\\n Line 2\\\"]\\n```\\n\\n## Examples for Common Use Cases\\n\\n### Simple Process\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Receive Input] --> B[Validate]\\n B --> C{Valid?}\\n C -->|Yes| D[Process]\\n C -->|No| E[Return Error]\\n D --> F[Return Result]\\n```\\n\\n### Decision with Multiple Options\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n A[Start] --> B{Choose Action}\\n B -->|Option A| C[Do A]\\n B -->|Option B| D[Do B]\\n B -->|Option C| E[Do C]\\n C --> F[End]\\n D --> F\\n E --> F\\n```\\n\\n### Pipeline with Stages\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart LR\\n subgraph Input\\n A[Raw Data]\\n end\\n subgraph Processing\\n B[Transform] --> C[Validate] --> D[Enrich]\\n end\\n subgraph Output\\n E[Store]\\n end\\n A --> B\\n D --> E\\n```\\n\\n## When NOT to Use Mermaid\\n\\nUse Excalidraw JSON instead when you need:\\n- **Mindmaps** — Mermaid mindmaps render as images\\n- **Custom layouts** — Precise positioning control\\n- **ER diagrams** — Render as images in Excalidraw\\n- **Timelines** — Render as images\\n- **Sequence diagrams** — Render as images\\n- **State diagrams** — Render as images\\n- **Non-standard shapes** — Custom styling\\n- **Mixed diagram types** — Combining different visuals\\n\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01Ms36X1dL8CSNkdyoqrpner","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":116350,"cache_write_tokens":2581,"cache_read_tokens":113768,"output_tokens":1609,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":2581,"cache_read_input_tokens":113768,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1609}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:19:25.243888Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_014f9pc4sqBR89Y4t2WAcMT6","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"a90c9c41-8447-4fba-b99d-b33ea4761d8d","metadata":null}
